claims.statement: Lake Baikal max depth is larger than Victoria Falls height.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Lake Baikal max depth: 1642 m. Victoria Falls height: 108 m.

claims.statement: Brisk walking is slower than Peregrine falcon dive.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Brisk walking: 5 km/h. Peregrine falcon dive: 390 km/h.

claims.statement: Great Wall of China length is at least 3× longer than Suez Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Great Wall of China length: 21196 km. Suez Canal length: 193 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer strings on a violin than known chemical elements.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 4 strings vs 118 elements.

claims.statement: Barcode first scanned happened before First iPhone released.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Barcode first scanned: 1974. First iPhone released: 2007.
